notes: Phase 2.4 plan created based on ARCHITECTURE_DESIGN.md v1.1. 7 tasks: Task1 Loop Guard/CircuitBreaker, Task2 Context 4+1 stages (70%/90% thresholds), Task3 LLM error classification 8 types + retry, Task4 EventBus broadcast+ringbuffer, Task5 BashTool security (ExecSecurityMode/env_clear/path-traversal), Task6 Batch3 bugfix 5 items (TokenBudgetUpdate/snapshot/recorder-db/sessions-list/working-memory), Task7 build validation + docs update.
